description: Postmortem P6 catalog (_runs/2026-07-02/postmortem-ecosystem-stranded-work.md): every registered heartbeat/tripwire safety function in lib/os/services/. A safety function that isn't listed here has not declared its heartbeat + tripwire, per doctrine. Cross-checked at review time by lib/os/services/heartbeat-registry.cjs validateRegistry().

services.name: backlog-staleness
services.tripwire: BACKLOG.md 'Last-reconciled: S###' gap exceeds threshold sessions (default 12) vs. current session
services.note: the template this whole registry pattern is built from

services.name: strand-o-meter
services.cadence: cached read every SessionStart; detached background refresh, 6h staleness window
services.tripwire: unpushed-ahead branches, dirty-tree age/count, stash count/age across configured portfolio repos (.4ge/portfolio-repos.json)

services.name: closeout-tripwire
services.tripwire: main ahead of origin/main touching continuity files, OR no _runs/HANDOFF-S<N>.md for the derived current session
